content:
Hello everyone,

We wish to address recent complaints about moderating on the server. We hear you and want to assure you that moderation will improve. We are continuing actively in the process of making the improvements in the Server as we have mentioned before.

To help streamline moderation inquiries, feedback, role inquiries and private reports, we will be implementing <@575252669443211264> 

This system will allow you to contact our staff team directly and confidentially. We believe this will be a valuable tool for improving how we handle your concerns.

To preserve order and provide a safe environment for everybody, our staff team may give timeouts without public explanation. Our staff team have the discretion to handle issues as they see fit, and they are not required to explain their actions in public chat. We will take into account everything that was said in <#1385040039448412170>  and then erase it so that the channel is clear of clutter. If you have any concerns regarding a specific action, questions or concerns, please contact <@575252669443211264>  and open a ticket, we will address the issue in a timely manner. 

We recognize that with 30,000 members on the server, implementing all of these changes now will be a significant adjustment not only for us, but especially for the community. Please be patient with us during this transition, as we are temporarily short-staffed. We appreciate your patience and understanding as we continue to improve the server environment for all. 🙏 🌹 

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

大家好， 

我们想就近期大家对服务器管理方面的投诉做出回应。我们听到了大家的反馈，并向大家保证，管理工作将会得到改进。正如我们之前提到的，我们正在积极推进服务器的改进工作。

为了简化审核咨询、反馈、角色查询和私人举报流程，我们将启用 <@575252669443211264> 。

通过此系统，您可以直接、保密地联系我们的工作人员。我们相信，这将成为我们改进处理您提出的问题方式的重要工具。

为了维护秩序，为所有人提供安全的环境，我们的管理团队可能会在不公开解释的情况下对违规用户进行禁言。管理团队有权酌情处理问题，无需在公共聊天中解释其行为。我们会认真考虑<#1385040039448412170> 频道中的所有内容，并将其删除，以保持频道整洁。如果您对具体操作有任何疑问或担忧，请联系 <@575252669443211264>  并提交工单，我们会及时处理。

我们意识到，服务器拥有 3 万名成员，现在实施所有这些变更不仅对我们而言，对整个社区来说都将是一次重大调整。由于我们目前人手暂时不足，请大家在过渡期间耐心等待。感谢您的耐心和理解，我们将继续努力改善服务器环境，造福所有用户。🙏🌹
@everyone
